name: aos-harness
description: Run AOS Harness deliberation and execution workflows from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run AOS Harness CLI workflows from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Local Codex plugin for listing, validating, scaffolding, replaying, and running AOS Harness deliberation and execution workflows through the shared CLI wrapper.
defaultPrompt: List the available AOS profiles, domains, and briefs.
Run a strategic-council dry-run on a local brief.
Author a new AOS brief from an idea.
